title: Past monetary policy decisions - Reserve Bank of New Zealand - Te Pūtea Matua
content:
It looks like the browser you're using doesn’t work well with our website. For a better experience, please update to the latest version of Chrome , Edge , Firefox or Safari .

## Past monetary policy decisions
See our Official Cash Rate (OCR) decisions since 1999, and find all our media releases and statements on monetary policy.

## How has the OCR changed over the years?
This data is updated at the end of each month.

## Timeline of our OCR announcements since November 1999
Our Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) reviews the OCR 8 times a year.
We publish our Monetary Policy Statement 4 times a year.

Additional asset purchases under the Large-scale Asset Purchases (LSAP) programme halted by 23 July 2021.

Media release | Statement
Funding for Lending Programme (FLP) announced for deployment in December 2020.
Media release | Statement
Large-scale Asset Purchase (LSAP) programme expanded to include up to $100 billion of bond purchases.
Media release | Statement
LSAP programme expanded to include up to $60 billion of bond purchases. NZ government inflation-indexed bonds added to eligible purchases.
$3 billion of Local Government Funding Agency (LGFA) bonds added to potential LSAP.
LSAP of up to $30 billion of NZ government bonds announced.
Forward guidance that OCR will remain at this level for at least 12 months.
